basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mumbai Port Authority (MPA) Chief Engineer (HoD) Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 on the official website of Mumbai Port Authority. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MPA Chief Engineer (HoD) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognised university/Institution, 17 years experience in executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine structures
qualification.details: Chief Engineer: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognised university/Institution with 17 years experience in executive cadre in Planning/Construction/Design/Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine structures in an Industrial/Commercial/Govt. Undertaking.

salary_details.details: Rs. 100000 - 260000 Per Month (elevated to Rs. 120000-280000 after three years regular service)

selection_process: Merit based on APARs Services Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mumbai Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Recruitment 2026 is 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Chief Engineer (HoD) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Chief Engineer (HoD) post in the Mumbai Port Authority Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Engineer (HoD) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/institution with 17 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Engineer (HoD) position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 100000 - 260000 Per Month, which will be elevated to Rs. 120000-280000 after three years of regular service.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Mumbai Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Mumbai Port Authority is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400001.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be selected for the Chief Engineer (HoD) post?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit determined by APARs and through a Services Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q10. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the Mumbai Port Authority Chief Engineer (HoD) Recruitment 2026 starts on 12 June 2026.
